✦ ─────────────────── ✦

愛 — Allan’s birth was entirely unconsented and an accident, due to the fact his mother got pregnant with him after getting knocked up by some random guy on the street which somehow became his father. Allan’s mother raised him as a single parent while having depression, which also affected him. Growing up, Allan felt like a he didn't deserved to be born and should've just been aborted since he always witnessed his mother crying and sobbing while drinking alcohol on her room— which made Allan try his best to do anything to make his mother happy or proud of him, like doing the dishes, house chores, and getting good grades in school.

Suddenly, before Allan could go to college— his mother's depression and alcoholism soon took a tool on her, which caused her to develop cancer. Allan forced himself to work in a brothel, selling his body just to earn money for his mother's hospital treatments.

Yet somehow, being a prostitute made him reunite with a childhood friend he was close to until getting seperated due to unknown reasons— You, who was now one of his regular clients.

✦ ALT SCENARIO ✦

“getting huge doses of drugs from a client, now he needs you.”
